title: platyloma cordatum
intro: Platyloma cordatum, also known as the African potato or potato bush, is a type of succulent plant native to southern Africa, characterized by its edible tubers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Platyloma cordatum include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and even showing potential in managing diabetes and hypertension. The plant is often harvested for its tubers, which can be dried, crushed, or made into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
